memory_entries.text: Database product schema: g1 is the Office Products dataset (items_g1/fdbk_g1, plus attrs_g1, fdbk_stats_g1, taxn_g1); g2 is Electronics (items_g2/fdbk_g2/taxn_g2); g3 includes Musical Instruments (items_g3/fdbk_g3/attrs_g3). Items tables use ref_id PK, ttl, avg_rtg, main_cat; feedback joins by ref_id and has rtg.

attrs_g3 columns are ref_id, attr_key, attr_val; musical instrument brand is stored as attr_key='Brand' (case-insensitive) and attr_val contains brand names. As of Q11, Fender had the most g3 musical instrument products (243 distinct ref_id).
Electronics feedback table fdbk_g2 has Unix epoch seconds column ts; Q4 2021 electronics reviews count is 1867 using ts >= 2021-10-01 and < 2022-01-01.

Musical instruments current attribute feed table is product_attributes_g3 with 202543 rows; older attribute export is attrs_g3_legacy with 182566 rows; current/older ratio rounded to 2 decimals is 1.11.

Office products active catalog filter is items_g1.status='active'. Office review text verification label is fdbk_g1.verified_status; missing labels are NULL, labeled are NOT NULL. For active office products with nonempty body, unlabeled minus labeled average body length is 1.1 chars (Q30).

Office products query pattern: active products use items_g1.status='active'; verified reviews are fdbk_g1.verified_status='verified'. Q34 result: 430 active office products have at least 5 verified reviews and AVG(fdbk_g1.rtg)=5.0.

Correction for Office Products Q34: 514 active office products have at least 5 verified reviews and AVG(fdbk_g1.rtg)=5.0 (not 430); verified reviews may require careful handling of verified_status/schema details.
